title: Tao Te Ching 14
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 14 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 14 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Look at it and do not see it: we call it the invisible. Listen to it and do not hear it: we call it the inaudible.
